deviations.description: The process model includes the task 'Measure blood pressure and pulse', which is now permitted to be absent according to the new requirement. The process performs an activity that is no longer required, resulting in over-compliance.

The process model enforces the measurement of both blood pressure and pulse as a prerequisite for determining donor eligibility, while the new requirement permits donor eligibility determination without these measurements. This results in over-compliance.
process_model_reference: Determine donor eligibility (implied by the sequence including 'Measure blood pressure and pulse')
